summary: Remove private healthcare-specific doctor-discover and clinic-enrich commands from the public Context.dev CLI surface, rename the generic workflow source file, and update catalogue copy for public users.
reason: The public library should expose reusable Context.dev website intelligence workflows without private provider/clinic shortcuts or healthcare-specific documentation. Generic web, brand, crawl, extraction, styleguide, screenshot, competitor, source-pack, change-digest, and enrichment workflows remain available.
validated_outcome: Root help no longer registers doctor-discover or clinic-enrich; public catalogue descriptions emphasize Context.dev website intelligence, brand enrichment, scraping/crawling, extraction, screenshots, styleguides, competitor maps, source packs, and change digests.
